action.reasoning: Observation: Current best test accuracy 0.7923 using pretrained ResNet-18 with full replay + joint training. The training script printed bizarre val_acc=0.0038 but eval shows strong performance, likely a logging bug in final print (maybe using internal label mapping incorrectly) — the model itself is fine. With 34 min left, we cannot run another full training. Analysis: We can boost accuracy without retraining by implementing test-time augmentation (TTA) in predict.py (multiple random crops/flips and averaging logits). This typically gives +0.5-1.0% for CIFAR-100. Decision: Rewrite predict.py to include TTA (10 augmented views per image) and submit eval with the same best.pt checkpoint to achieve a new record.
